description: Policy for classifying field quality in the BenchCore benchmark pack. Distinguishes between finite-target fields (enum-like) and noisy-or-free-text fields.

classification_rules.description: Fields with a fixed set of known values are classified as finite_target.
classification_rules.test: field has defined enum or set of allowed values

classification_rules.description: Fields with unbounded, variable, or natural language content are classified as noisy_or_free_text.
classification_rules.test: field value is free-form text, log output, or natural language

classification_rules.description: Each noisy_or_free_text field must have an accompanying rationale explaining why it cannot be finite_target.
classification_rules.test: field appears in noisy_fields and has rationale_documentation

quality_metrics.finite_target_precision: Percentage of finite_target fields whose values match the expected enum set
quality_metrics.noisy_field_coverage: Percentage of noisy fields with documented rationale
